closingText.text: O-50007 has cleared the credit hold and is being picked at the Atlanta DC. Expected to ship May 22 — that's day 7 from submission, which is within Copper Creek's normal SLA. No customer-side action needed. Want me to send Hannah a quick heads-up so she can confirm with the buyer?
